# Zipchat

- [Segments](https://docs.zipchat.ai/installation-and-setup/contacts/segments.md): Segments are group of phone numbers you can upload to run WhatsApp Marketing Campaigns.

- [Channels](https://docs.zipchat.ai/installation-and-setup/chat-settings/channels.md)

- [WhatsApp: Handle display name rejections](https://docs.zipchat.ai/installation-and-setup/chat-settings/channels/whatsapp-handle-display-name-rejections.md)
- [Email: connecting Zipchat to your Inbox](https://docs.zipchat.ai/installation-and-setup/chat-settings/channels/email-connecting-zipchat-to-your-inbox.md): With ZipChat, you can empower your AI agent to manage customer support emails directly. Follow this step-by-step guide to set up the integration and start responding to emails automatically.
- [Zendesk: Connecting Zipchat to Your Zendesk Account](https://docs.zipchat.ai/installation-and-setup/chat-settings/channels/zendesk-connecting-zipchat-to-your-zendesk-account.md): Let Zipchat answer your customers inside Zendesk — both email tickets and the Web Widget — and hand off cleanly to your human   team when needed.

- [Contact Information](https://docs.zipchat.ai/installation-and-setup/chat-settings/configuration/contact-information.md)

- [Backend API](https://docs.zipchat.ai/installation-and-setup/chat-settings/integrations/backend-api.md): The Backend API lets you programmatically access your Zipchat conversation data. Use it to sync conversations with your CRM, build custom analytics dashboards, take over conversations from the AI, and
- [Account Management](https://docs.zipchat.ai/installation-and-setup/account-management.md)

---

# Agent Instructions: Querying This Documentation

If you need additional information, you can query the documentation dynamically by asking a question.

Perform an HTTP GET request on a page URL with the `ask` query parameter:

```
GET https://docs.zipchat.ai/quickstart.md?ask=<question>
```

The question should be specific, self-contained, and written in natural language.
The response will contain a direct answer to the question and relevant excerpts and sources from the documentation.

Use this mechanism when the answer is not explicitly present in the current page, you need clarification or additional context, or you want to retrieve related documentation sections.
